title: Piel en Armonia | Sony V3
description: Public dermatology frontend with a cinematic stage, program catalogue, and integrated booking.

slides.title: The right first decision starts with a cleaner clinical reading.
slides.deck: The home page now opens with diagnosis, continuity, and medical routes before any conversion push.

slides.title: Procedures explained as a care system, not as a stack of cards.
slides.deck: Laser, peels, toxin, and biostimulators are presented with fit, timing, and continuity.

mediaMeta.alt: Patient in a medical aesthetics protocol

slides.title: Remote care when it fits. In-person escalation when it does not.
slides.deck: Telemedicine no longer lives as an isolated shortcut. It belongs to the same clinical language and booking system.

latest.title: Initial triage can now start in telemedicine without breaking the clinical flow.
The aesthetic family is navigated as a full program instead of a flat menu.
Children and teenagers keep a dedicated entry point with dermatology logic.

featuredStories.title: Diagnosis first. Then the right route.
featuredStories.deck: Suspicious lesions, acne, hair, and nails now open with a more technical and less promotional medical module.

featuredStories.title: Each procedure opens with fit, timing, and continuity already visible.
featuredStories.deck: Program reading comes before the form and keeps the page from feeling like one generic commercial grid.

featuredStories.title: Pediatric dermatology with its own language.
featuredStories.deck: Dermatitis, adolescent acne, warts, and scalp concerns are presented as a clearer route for families.

telemedicine.title: Remote care inside the same clinical system.
telemedicine.deck: Use video, phone, or WhatsApp for first guidance, acne or dermatitis follow-up, and structured escalation to clinic.
points: Video, phone, or WhatsApp as the entry point
In-person escalation when the case requires it
Booking continuity and support inside the same shell

doctors.name: Dr. Javier Rosero
doctors.deck: Early detection, suspicious lesions, and diagnostic leadership across general dermatology.

doctors.name: Dr. Carolina Narvaez
doctors.deck: Laser, injectables, skin quality, and rejuvenation sequences with medical framing.

booking.title: Booking no longer defines the page, but it stays ready to convert.
booking.deck: You can enter from general assessment, a specific detail page, or telemedicine without losing the same operational runtime.
